Forget today's 'greats' for a second...

Samuel Eto'o's legacy? Pure, unadulterated domination. He's the ONLY player in history to win back-to-back Trebles with TWO different clubs: Barcelona (2009) & Inter Milan (2010)! Think about that. Two different tactical systems, same unbelievable impact.

That's not just winning, that's making history. Unforgettable.
